profile_timing_semantics: Summed complete-event duration; concurrent streams overlap and values are not request wall-clock time.

call_stack_annotation.scope: Targets are explicitly enumerated by _auto_call_targets and _vllm_call_targets; absence claims apply only to those selected boundaries.
call_stack_annotation.semantics: Profiler ranges around methods invoked by the live runtime object graph. The dedicated lane copies those measured ranges without replacing native events; nesting and durations are trace-derived host observations.

capture_harness_verification.method: remote deployed files matched git object content by SHA-256

phase_annotation.semantics: Host engine-step ranges. Native framework and device events remain unchanged; terminal async drains are visible but excluded from decode.

auto-infer.evidence: EngineConfig CacheConfig plus matched runtime kv_capacity readback

omni-npu.evidence: profile metadata runtime readback plus retained capture log

vllm-ascend.evidence: profile metadata runtime readback plus retained capture log
